Prediction.title: Prediction Record
Prediction.description: An individual user's sports match score and event prediction receipt.

matchId.description: Reference ID matching PRESET matchups or custom tag

predictedScoreA.description: Predicted goals for primary contestant team

predictedScoreB.description: Predicted goals for secondary contestant team

firstGoalscorer.description: Predicted first player to score in match

boldPredictions.description: List of extreme or auxiliary event projections for higher earnings multipliers

isGolden.description: Whether prediction receipt tier was upgraded using Dodo checkout

goldenMessage.description: Premium message or certified label stamped onto receipt

timestamp.description: Formatted date and clock timestamp of creation

barcodeValue.description: Barcoded stamp text representation for physical scanning emulation

tipAmount.description: Optional tip value added to prize pool in USD cents or dollars

outcomeScoreA.description: Actual score line for primary team once resolved

outcomeScoreB.description: Actual score line for secondary team once resolved

scoreMatched.description: Whether user's score predictions were exactly correct

goalscorerMatched.description: Whether first goalscorer prediction was exactly correct

Outcome.title: Match Outcome
Outcome.description: The official verified sports match score and scorer outcome set by referee control.

actualScoreA.description: Official final score line for Team A

actualScoreB.description: Official final score line for Team B

actualFirstGoalscorer.description: Official verified first player who scored in the match

resolvedAt.description: UTC ISO timestamp when resolution was locked

predictions/{predictionId}.description: Collection storing all users' pre-match prophecy receipts

outcomes/{outcomeId}.description: Collection storing FIFA official referee verified match outcomes
